queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between minimal savings account balances and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk.
Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the impact of extended loan duration on default probability and borrower delinquency rates.
